edit_summary: Round 1 NEEDS_WORK resolved: REQ-004 now names Security-Sensitive:true as the explicit cross-model trigger and binds Cross-Model-Waiver: validity to a co-located human Approval:Approved mark (second distinct approver) so it is inert when agent-written; added Field Definitions; reworded AC-008/AC-009; added AC-014 for the no-PR vacuous-pass path.
